{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Content Presenter (NYSC)",
  "description": "Seedbuilders is a leading Information, Communication, and Technology Company, Technology and Innovation Ecosystem Contributor, Coworking Partner, leading digital skills and ICT training provider, Human Capacity Development Specialist, and Advisory firm in Nigeria that offers services to the public, private, and developmental sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Content Presenter (NYSC)

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Nysc

Job Summary


	We are seeking a confident and creative person to join our team as a Digital Content Presenter.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for presenting engaging digital content, representing the brand on camera, and supporting the creation of impactful multimedia content for our audience.
	This role is perfect for an individual who is passionate about media, storytelling, and public communication, and is looking to gain hands-on experience in digital content production.


Key Responsibilities


	Storytelling, Copywriting and Content Creation.
	Present engaging video content for digital platforms (social media, website, campaigns, etc.) for our products and services.
	Serve as an on-camera host for brand storytelling and promotional content.
	Collaborate with the content and creative team to develop video ideas and scripts.
	Research topics and stay updated on trends relevant to our audience.
	Deliver clear, confident, and engaging on-screen presentations.
	Assist in basic content planning and production activities when required.
	Represent the brand professionally in all public-facing content.


Requirements


	Candidates must have a Degree in Mass communication, Marketing, Media, Public Relations, Journalism, English Language or related Field.
	Currently serving as a NYSC Corps Member posted to Abuja.


Skills &amp; Attributes:


	Strong verbal communication and presentation skills.
	High energy and engaging personality on camera.
	Time management and consistency.
	Willingness to learn and improve presentation skills.
	Strong confidence and excellent public speaking skills.
	Creative mindset with interest in content creation and digital media.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to take direction and work collaboratively with a team.
	Enthusiasm for storytelling content is an advantage.
	Maintains a neat and professional personal presentation.


What We Offer


	Salary Range: N80,000 - N100,000
	Hands-on experience in digital media, communication, presentation, storytelling and content creation.
	Opportunity to build a professional media portfolio.
	Mentorship and exposure to a creative work environment.
	Practical experience in on-camera presentation and storytelling.
	Supportive and collaborative team culture.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-22",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-13",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Seedbuilders Innovation Hub"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "199325"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Digital Content Presenter (NYSC) Job at Seedbuilders Innovation Hub




        
    

        
        Seedbuilders is a leading Information, Communication, and Technology Company, Technology and Innovation Ecosystem Contributor, Coworking Partner, leading digital skills and ICT training provider, Human Capacity Development Specialist, and Advisory firm in Nigeria that offers services to the public, private, and developmental sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Content Presenter (NYSC)

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Nysc

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a confident and creative person to join our team as a Digital Content Presenter.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for presenting engaging digital content, representing the brand on camera, and supporting the creation of impactful multimedia content for our audience.
	This role is perfect for an individual who is passionate about media, storytelling, and public communication, and is looking to gain hands-on experience in digital content production.


Key Responsibilities


	Storytelling, Copywriting and Content Creation.
	Present engaging video content for digital platforms (social media, website, campaigns, etc.) for our products and services.
	Serve as an on-camera host for brand storytelling and promotional content.
	Collaborate with the content and creative team to develop video ideas and scripts.
	Research topics and stay updated on trends relevant to our audience.
	Deliver clear, confident, and engaging on-screen presentations.
	Assist in basic content planning and production activities when required.
	Represent the brand professionally in all public-facing content.


Requirements


	Candidates must have a Degree in Mass communication, Marketing, Media, Public Relations, Journalism, English Language or related Field.
	Currently serving as a NYSC Corps Member posted to Abuja.


Skills & Attributes:


	Strong verbal communication and presentation skills.
	High energy and engaging personality on camera.
	Time management and consistency.
	Willingness to learn and improve presentation skills.
	Strong confidence and excellent public speaking skills.
	Creative mindset with interest in content creation and digital media.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to take direction and work collaboratively with a team.
	Enthusiasm for storytelling content is an advantage.
	Maintains a neat and professional personal presentation.


What We Offer


	Salary Range: N80,000 - N100,000
	Hands-on experience in digital media, communication, presentation, storytelling and content creation.
	Opportunity to build a professional media portfolio.
	Mentorship and exposure to a creative work environment.
	Practical experience in on-camera presentation and storytelling.
	Supportive and collaborative team culture.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Information Security Officer",
  "description": "BlueChip Technologies is a leading business application firm focused exclusively on assisting organizations in planning, designing, implementing and operating business application solutions and strategies that are central to creating and maintaining a competitive business advantage.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Security Officer

Job Location: Lagos

Key Responsibilities


	Define and enforce security policies &amp; governance
	Ensure compliance with ISO 27001, GDPR, local regulations
	Manage risk assessments &amp; audits
	Oversee incident response &amp; security awareness
	Ensure organizational security, compliance &amp; risk management
	Cybersecurity frameworks, risk management, compliance.


Qualifications


	7 years of experience in information security.


Core Skills:


	Reduced security risks &amp; regulatory compliance
	Business Impact.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@bluechiptech.biz using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Information Security Officer Job at BlueChip Technologies




        
    

        
        BlueChip Technologies is a leading business application firm focused exclusively on assisting organizations in planning, designing, implementing and operating business application solutions and strategies that are central to creating and maintaining a competitive business advantage.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Security Officer

Job Location: Lagos

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Define and enforce security policies & governance
	Ensure compliance with ISO 27001, GDPR, local regulations
	Manage risk assessments & audits
	Oversee incident response & security awareness
	Ensure organizational security, compliance & risk management
	Cybersecurity frameworks, risk management, compliance.


Qualifications


	7 years of experience in information security.


Core Skills:


	Reduced security risks & regulatory compliance
	Business Impact.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HSE Officer",
  "description": "International Facilities Services Limited (IFS) is a leading integrated facilities management company delivering technical, engineering, maintenance, cleaning, and operational support services across Nigeria and West Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Officer

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are currently seeking a proactive and detail-oriented HSE Officer to join our team in Apapa, Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for promoting workplace health and safety standards, ensuring compliance with HSE regulations, and supporting the development of a safe working environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Implement and monitor HSE policies and procedures
	Conduct routine safety inspections and risk assessments
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations
	Investigate incidents and prepare detailed reports
	Organize safety trainings and awareness programs
	Maintain accurate HSE records and documentation
	Ensure proper use of PPE and safety equipment


Requirements


	B.Sc Degree /HND in Environmental Science, Safety Management, Engineering, or related field
	1&ndash;3 years of relevant HSE experience
	Basic HSE certifications will be an added advantage
	Good communication and reporting skills
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability.


Salary
N150,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: klinsajobs@gmail.com using &ldquo;HSE Officer &ndash; Apapa&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Candidates residing within or around Apapa are encouraged to apply.
	For inquiries, contact 08128208887.

HSE Officer Job at International Facilities Services Limited




        
    

        
        International Facilities Services Limited (IFS) is a leading integrated facilities management company delivering technical, engineering, maintenance, cleaning, and operational support services across Nigeria and West Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Officer

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently seeking a proactive and detail-oriented HSE Officer to join our team in Apapa, Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for promoting workplace health and safety standards, ensuring compliance with HSE regulations, and supporting the development of a safe working environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Implement and monitor HSE policies and procedures
	Conduct routine safety inspections and risk assessments
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations
	Investigate incidents and prepare detailed reports
	Organize safety trainings and awareness programs
	Maintain accurate HSE records and documentation
	Ensure proper use of PPE and safety equipment


Requirements


	B.Sc Degree /HND in Environmental Science, Safety Management, Engineering, or related field
	1–3 years of relevant HSE experience
	Basic HSE certifications will be an added advantage
	Good communication and reporting skills
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability.


Salary
N150,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using “HSE Officer – Apapa” as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Candidates residing within or around Apapa are encouraged to apply.
	For inquiries, contact 08128208887.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Head of Technical Job at Strategic Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        Strategic Outsourcing Limited (SOL) is a Nigerian workforce solutions company providing personnel outsourcing, recruitment, payroll administration, and workforce support services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Head of Technical 

Job Location: Lekki-Chevron Area, Lagos

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branch Manager",
  "description": "Estrada International Staffing Solutions is a strategic boutique specialist recruitment consulting firm, serving clients with expertise recruitment services across all sectors ranging from Banking, Insurance, Oil and Gas, Telecommunications, FMCGs and Construction, with the aim of satisfying their recruitment needs.

We pride ourselves in the finesse we adopt in our recruitment service delivery. We match our clients&rsquo; expectations to pool unique talents and enable them effect positive change management which delivers organizational objectives. We also drive positive career growths for our talents.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

??Job Summary


	The Branch Manager will be responsible for the overall management and profitability of the branch.
	The role involves driving business growth, ensuring operational efficiency, managing staff performance, and delivering excellent customer service in line with the bank&#39;s strategic objectives and regulatory standards.
	The Branch Manager will also oversee loan portfolio quality, deposit mobilization, and risk management at the branch level.


??Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily branch operations to ensure smooth and efficient service delivery.
	Drive deposit mobilization and loan portfolio growth in line with set targets.
	Ensure high-quality customer service and resolution of customer complaints.
	Supervise branch staff and ensure optimal performance across all functions.
	Monitor loan applications, approvals, disbursements, and recoveries.
	Ensure compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and audit standards.
	Prepare and submit periodic operational and financial reports.
	Manage branch risk, including credit risk and operational risk controls.
	Develop and implement strategies to grow branch profitability.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and local stakeholders.


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Banking &amp; Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Economics, or related field.
	Professional certification (e.g., CIBN, ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage.


?Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of banking experience.
	At least 2 years in a supervisory or branch leadership role within a microfinance or commercial bank.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Application to: l.omenai@estradaintl.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
